name: @qorium/saml
description: SAML 2.0 + SCIM 2.0 + OIDC primitives: assertion validation, AuthnRequest builder, JIT provisioning, replay-attack guard, SCIM token validator. Sprint 3.3 per infra/SSO-SAML-Enterprise-Spec-v1.md. Lexical-only validation; live IdP integration tests halt on cred-drop per spec §9.
